title: Assign parent row owner as subitem owner

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Within the “Create Subitem” automation recipe, I need to point the subitem owner assignment to the parent row owner so that it can change dynamically.

Specific use: our onboarding process includes an automation that creates 25 subitems most of which need to be assigned to the hiring manager of the new hire. The hiring manager is assigned to the parent row automatically when they add the new hire’s information. Now I need the subitem creation recipe automation to allow me to assign the subitems to that hiring manger listed in the parent row.

The hiring manager will change for every new hire so there is a great need to automate this.
